problem_statement: You are given a sorted array arr of distinct values and a target value x. You need to search for the index of the target value in the array.

examples.explanation:
6 is not present in the array. So, if we will insert 6 in the 3rd index(0-based indexing), the array will still be sorted. {1,2,4,6,7}.

Example 2:
2 is present in the array and so we will return its index i.e. 1.
